# Transcrição: 05-Advanced Matching 

- **Fonte:** 05-Advanced Matching

## [00:00 - 00:51]

So in order to set up advanced matching now, it's actually a lot easier. All you need to do is just go to where it says install pixel, you need to scroll down so it's on step 3 here. And you just say automatic advanced matching. So this is a feature that Facebook has recently rolled out, so you don't even have to manipulate the code anymore. Facebook will automatically get fed this hash data. So you can choose exactly what you want to share with Facebook by selecting here. You can say email, phone number, first name, last name, you can say city, state, or zip code. You can choose the gender if you want. Pretty much everything here is what you'll be able to track with advanced matching. This will essentially track all the extra data on your site and pass that data to Facebook so that you can expand your audiences and ultimately track more conversion data.
